title: Batch upload via CommandList with safe chunking
description:
Feature: Batch upload via CommandList with safe chunking
Scenario: Large frame sets are chunked safely
Given a GifSequence with 90 frames
When upload_sequence is called in command_list mode with chunk_size 40
Then three Draw/CommandList requests are sent with chunk sizes 40, 40, and 10

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented and verified Draw/CommandList chunking behavior (including 90-frame, chunk_size=40 scenario).
